phase_error_rate_model.notes: Used as normalized multipliers when sampling error step indices (WHERE errors land).

deletion_guard.note: Data-driven guard using learned P(object reused soon | predicate)

steps.step_description: Unbox covid test package
steps.semantic_representation: UNBOX(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_package)

steps.step_description: Arrange test material on the table
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: test_material, Location: on(table))

steps.step_description: Read the test instruction sheet.
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: test_instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Return a test kit item to the package
steps.semantic_representation: RETURN(Agent: you, Object: test_kit_item, Destination: to(package))
taxonomy_path: return the test kit items back into the box

steps.step_description: Get the test vial
steps.semantic_representation: GET(Agent: you, Object: test_vial)

steps.step_description: Fill the test vial with the solution
steps.semantic_representation: FILL(Agent: you, Destination: test_vial, Object: solution)
taxonomy_path: Fill the testing with a testing solution

steps.step_description: Read the test instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: test_instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Unwrap unused swab
steps.semantic_representation: UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: unused_swab)
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the collection swab

steps.step_description: Insert the test swab into her nostril
steps.semantic_representation: INSERT(Agent: you, Object: test_swab, Destination: into(nostril(of(her)))
taxonomy_path: Slowly insert the tip of the swab into the nose

steps.step_description: Rotate the test swab around her nostril
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: test_swab, Location: around(nostril(of(her)))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Extract the test swab from her nostril
steps.semantic_representation: EXTRACT(Agent: you, Object: test_swab, Origin: from(nostril(of(her))))
taxonomy_path: Slowly extract the swab from the nostril

steps.step_description: Repeat the process with the other nostril
steps.semantic_representation: REPEAT(Agent: you, Theme: process, Object: with(left_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Repeat the process with the other nostril

steps.step_description: Read the test instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: test_instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Dip the test swab into the test vial
steps.semantic_representation: DIP(Agent: you, Object: test_swab, Destination: into(test_vial))
taxonomy_path: Dip the swab into the testing tube

steps.step_description: Rotate the test swab around the test vial
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: test_swab, Path: around(test_vial))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Read the instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Unwrap test indicator
steps.semantic_representation: UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: test_indicator)
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the test strip

steps.step_description: Read instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Wait for the test vial to incubation time
steps.semantic_representation: WAIT(Agent: you, Object: test_vial, Duration: until(incubation_time))
taxonomy_path: Wait for the testing solution incubation time

steps.step_description: Remove the swab from the test vial
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: swab, Origin: from(test_vial))
taxonomy_path: Remove the swab from the testing tube

steps.step_description: Insert the collection swab in its pack for disposal
steps.semantic_representation: INSERT(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab, Destination: in(pack(of(it))), Purpose: disposal)

steps.step_description: Cover the test vial with the lid
steps.semantic_representation: COVER(Agent: you, Object: test_vial, Instrument: lid)

steps.step_description: Apply few drops of test solution into the test indicator
steps.semantic_representation: APPLY(Agent: you, Object: few_drops(of(test_solution)), Coobject: into(test_indicator))
taxonomy_path: Apply a few drops of the testing solution to the testing plate

steps.step_description: Arrange test materials on the table for disposal
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials(Location: on(table)), Purpose: disposal)

steps.step_description: Waits for 1-2 minutes
steps.semantic_representation: WAIT(Agent: you, Duration: for(1-2_minutes))

steps.step_description: Check the test indicator
steps.semantic_representation: CHECK(Agent: you, Object: test_indicator)

steps.step_description: Unbox the test materials from the covid test box onto a table
steps.semantic_representation: UNBOX(Agent: you, Object: test_materials, Origin: from(covid_test_box), Destination: onto(table))

steps.step_description: Open up the covid test instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: OPEN(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Read the covid test instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Put away the covid test instruction sheet on the table
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_instruction_sheet(Location: on(table)))

steps.step_description: Remove the test tube seal from the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube_seal, Origin: from(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: carefully open the test tube seal paper

steps.step_description: Place the test tube in an erect position on the covid test box
steps.semantic_representation: PLACE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube, Manner: in(erect_position), Location: on(covid_test_box))
taxonomy_path: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box

steps.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from its package
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Origin: from(package(of(nasal_swab))))
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the collection swab

steps.step_description: Insert the tip of the nasal swab into the left nostril
steps.semantic_representation: INSERT(Agent: you, Object: tip(of(nasal_swab)), Destination: into(left_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Slowly insert the tip of the swab into the nose

steps.step_description: Rotate the nasal swab inside the left nostril
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Location: inside(left_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from the left nostril
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Origin: from(left_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Slowly extract the swab from the nostril

steps.step_description: Collect sample from the right nostril with the nasal swab
steps.semantic_representation: COLLECT(Agent: you, Object: sample, Origin: from(right_nostril), Instrument: nasal_swab)
taxonomy_path: Repeat the process with the other nostril

steps.step_description: Insert the nasal swab into the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: INSERT(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Destination: into(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: Dip the swab into the testing tube

steps.step_description: Rotate the nasal swab in the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Location: in(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: nasal_swab, Origin: from(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: Remove the swab from the testing tube

steps.step_description: Place the test tube in an erect position on the covid test box
steps.semantic_representation: PLACE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube, Manner: in(erect_position), Location: on(covid_test_box))
taxonomy_path: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box

steps.step_description: Dispose used covid test materials and packages into the ziplock waste bag
steps.semantic_representation: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: used_covid_test_materials & packages, Destination: into(ziplock_waste_bag))

steps.step_description: Cover the test tube with its cap
steps.semantic_representation: COVER(Agent: you, Object: test_tube, Instrument: cap(of(test_tube)))

steps.step_description: Remove the covid test plate from its package
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_plate, Origin: from(package(of(covid_test_plate))))
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the test plate

steps.step_description: Apply drops of testing solution inside the test tube onto the covid test plate
steps.semantic_representation: APPLY(Agent: you, Object: drops(of(testing_solution(Location: inside(test_tube)))), Coobject: onto(covid_test_plate))
taxonomy_path: Apply a few drops of the testing solution to the testing plate

steps.step_description: Dispose the test tube and covid test plate in the ziplock waste bag
steps.semantic_representation: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube & covid_test_plate, Destination: in(ziplock_waste_bag))

steps.step_description: Put away the used covid test items and the ziplock waste bag into the covid test box
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: used_covid_test_items & ziplock_waste_bag, Destination: into(covid_test_box))

role_to_value.Purpose: ALLOW(Agent: you, Object: SPREAD(Agent: oil, Destination: into(empty_space)))) & ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: skillet, Purpose: ALLOW(Agent: you, Object: SPREAD(Agent: oil, Destination: into(empty_space)))

taxonomy_path: Tilt and rotate the skillet to allow oil or butter flow into empty space

steps.step_description: Add sliced tomatoes to the frying pan from the plate
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: sliced_tomatoes, Destination: frying_pan, Origin: from(plate))

steps.step_description: Tilt the frying pan to stir the tomatoes
steps.semantic_representation: TILT(Agent: you, Object: frying_pan, Purpose: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes))

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Add water to the frying pan from the measuring cup
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: water, Destination: frying_pan, Origin: from(measuring_cup))

steps.step_description: Press the stove button to regulate heat temperature
steps.semantic_representation: PRESS(Agent: you, Object: stove_button, Purpose: REGULATE(Agent: you, Object: heat_temperature))

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Tilt the frying pan to stir the tomatoes
steps.semantic_representation: TILT(Agent: you, Object: frying_pan, Purpose: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes))

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Add water to the frying pan from the measuring cup
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: water, Destination: frying_pan, Origin: from(measuring_cup))

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Get a plate from the countertop
steps.semantic_representation: GET(Agent: you, Object: plate, Origin: from(countertop))

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Allow the tomatoes to cook in the frying pan
steps.semantic_representation: ALLOW(Agent: you, Purpose: COOK(Agent: tomatoes, Location: in(frying_pan)))
taxonomy_path: Leave to cook until the tomato becomes a little mushy.

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: tomatoes, Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Press the stove knob to regulate heat temperature
steps.semantic_representation: PRESS(Agent: you, Object: stove_knob, Purpose: REGULATE(Agent: you, Object: heat_temperature))

steps.step_description: Transfer the cooked tomatoes to the plate
steps.semantic_representation: TRANSFER(Agent: you, Object: cooked_tomatoes, Destination: plate)

steps.step_description: Place the frying pan on the stovetop
steps.semantic_representation: PLACE(Agent: you, Object: frying_pan, Destination: on(stovetop))
taxonomy_path: Place the skillet or pan or pot on the stove

steps.step_description: Add oil to the frying pan from the oil bottle
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: oil, Destination: frying_pan, Origin: from(oil_bottle))
taxonomy_path: Add ingredients to the skillet to combine tomato and eggs

steps.step_description: Add egg mixture into the frying pan from the bowl
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: egg_mixture, Destination: into(frying_pan), Origin: from(bowl))
taxonomy_path: Pour egg mixture into a skillet

steps.step_description: Stir the egg in the frying pan with the spatula
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: egg(Location: in(frying_pan)), Instrument: spatula)

steps.step_description: Get salt container from the countertop
steps.semantic_representation: GET(Agent: you, Object: salt_container, Origin: from(countertop))

steps.step_description: Add cooked tomatoes into the frying pan from the plate

steps.step_description: Press the stove knob to regulate heat temperature
steps.semantic_representation: PRESS(Agent: you, Object: stove_knob, Purpose: REGULATE(Agent: you, Object: heat_temperature))

steps.step_description: Add salt to frying pan from the salt container
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: salt, Destination: frying_pan, Origin: salt_container)

steps.step_description: Get sugar container from the countertop

steps.step_description: Add sugar to the frying pan from the sugar container

steps.step_description: Stir the tomatoes and egg with the spatula

steps.semantic_representation: GET(Agent: you, Object: spoon, Origin: from(dishwasher))

steps.step_description: Add coffee into the coffee cup on the countertop with the spoon.
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: coffee, Destination: into(coffee_cup(Location: on(countertop))), Instrument: spoon)

steps.step_description: Put away the sachet of coffee on the countertop.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: sachet(of(coffee))(Location: on(countertop)))

steps.step_description: Adjust the heat of the pot of water and cup of milk.
steps.semantic_representation: ADJUST(Agent: you, Object: heat(of(pot(of(water)))) & heat(of(cup(of(milk))))

steps.step_description: Turn off the heat of the pot of water.
steps.semantic_representation: TURN_OFF(Agent: you, Object: heat(of(pot(of(water)))))
taxonomy_path: Boil water in a pot or saucepan

steps.step_description: Add hot water into the coffee cup.
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: hot_water, Destination: into(coffee_cup))
taxonomy_path: Pour hot water in a slow, controlled manner over the coffee grounds

steps.step_description: Put away the pot in the sink.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: pot, Destination: in(sink))

steps.step_description: Stir the cup of milk.
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: cup(of(milk)))
taxonomy_path: Boil milk in a pot or saucepan
Stir the milk in the pot

steps.step_description: Place the napkin on the countertop.
steps.semantic_representation: PLACE(Agent: you, Object: napkin, Destination: on(countertop))

steps.step_description: Regulate the heat of the cup of milk.
steps.semantic_representation: REGULATE(Agent: you, Object: heat(of(cup(of(milk))))

steps.step_description: Remove the cup of milk from the stove.
steps.semantic_representation: REMOVE(Agent: you, Object: cup(of(milk)), Origin: from(stove))
taxonomy_path: Boil water in a pot or saucepan
Remove the skillet or pan or pot from the stove

steps.step_description: Stir the coffee in the coffee cup.
steps.semantic_representation: STIR(Agent: you, Object: coffee(Location: in(coffee_cup)))

steps.step_description: Pour the coffee into the cup.
steps.semantic_representation: POUR(Agent: you, Object: coffee, Destination: into(cup))
taxonomy_path: Strain the coffee into a cup

steps.step_description: Add hot milk into the coffee in the cup on the countertop.
steps.semantic_representation: ADD(Agent: you, Object: hot_milk, Coobject: into(coffee(Location: in(cup(Location: on(countertop))))))

steps.step_description: Put away the cup of milk into the sink.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: cup(of(milk)), Destination: into(sink))

steps.step_description: Put away the napkin on the countertop.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: napkin, Destination: on(countertop))

steps.step_description: Put away the coffee cup into the sink.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: coffee_cup, Destination: into(sink))
taxonomy_path: Put away pour-over coffee maker or dripper

steps.step_description: Put away the pot into the sink.
steps.semantic_representation: PUT_AWAY(Agent: you, Object: pot, Destination: into(sink))

steps.step_description: Arrange the test materials on the table
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials, Location: on(table))

steps.step_description: Unbox the covid test kit box
steps.semantic_representation: UNBOX(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_kit_box)

steps.step_description: Read the instruction sheet
steps.semantic_representation: READ(Agent: you, Object: instruction_sheet)

steps.step_description: Fold the instruction sheet on the table
steps.semantic_representation: FOLD(Agent: you, Object: instruction_sheet(Location: on(table)))

steps.step_description: Place test materials on the table
steps.semantic_representation: PLACE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials, Destination: on(table))

steps.step_description: Return the instruction sheet into the covid test kit box
steps.semantic_representation: RETURN(Agent: you, Object: instruction_sheet, Destination: into(covid_test_kit_box))
taxonomy_path: return the test kit items back into the box

steps.step_description: Unwrap the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: test_tube)

steps.step_description: Dispose the test tube wrap into a plastic bag
steps.semantic_representation: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube_wrap, Destination: into(plastic_bag))

steps.step_description: Unwrap the test tube from its pack
steps.semantic_representation: UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: test_tube, Origin: from(its_pack))

steps.step_description: Fold the covid test kit box on the table
steps.semantic_representation: FOLD(Agent: you, Object: covid_test_kit_box, Location: on(table))

steps.step_description: Carefully open the test tube seal paper
steps.semantic_representation: OPEN(Agent: you, Object: test_tube_seal_paper, Manner: carefully)
taxonomy_path: carefully open the test tube seal paper

steps.step_description: Dispose the seal paper into the plastic bag
steps.semantic_representation: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: seal_paper, Destination: into(plastic_bag))

steps.step_description: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box
steps.semantic_representation: POSITION(Agent: you, Object: covid_19_test_tube, Location: on(box))
taxonomy_path: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box

steps.step_description: Locate and unwrap the test plate
steps.semantic_representation: LOCATE(Agent: you, Object: test_plate); UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: test_plate)
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the test plate

steps.step_description: Arrange test materials in the plastic bag for disposal
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials, Destination: in(plastic_bag), Purpose: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials))

steps.step_description: Locate and unwrap the collection swab
steps.semantic_representation: LOCATE(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab); UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab)
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap the collection swab

steps.step_description: Insert the tip of the swab into the right nostril
steps.semantic_representation: INSERT(Agent: you, Object: tip(of(swab)), Destination: into(right_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Slowly insert the tip of the swab into the nose

steps.step_description: Rotate the collection swab in the right nostril
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab, Location: in(right_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Extract the collection swab from the right nostril
steps.semantic_representation: EXTRACT(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab, Origin: from(right_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Slowly extract the swab from the nostril

steps.step_description: Repeat the process with the left nostril
steps.semantic_representation: REPEAT(Agent: you, Theme: process, Object: with(left_nostril))
taxonomy_path: Repeat the process with the other nostril

steps.step_description: Dip the collection swab in the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: DIP(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab, Destination: in(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: Dip the swab into the testing tube

steps.step_description: Rotate the collection swab in the test tube
steps.semantic_representation: ROTATE(Agent: you, Object: collection_swab, Location: in(test_tube))
taxonomy_path: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times

steps.step_description: Locate and unwrap test tube cap
steps.semantic_representation: LOCATE(Agent: you, Object: test_tube_cap); UNWRAP(Agent: you, Object: test_tube_cap)
taxonomy_path: Locate and unwrap test tube cap

steps.step_description: Cover the test tube with its cap
steps.semantic_representation: COVER(Agent: you, Object: test_tube, Instrument: cap(of(test_tube)))

steps.step_description: Apply a few drops of the testing solution to the test plate
steps.semantic_representation: APPLY(Agent: you, Object: few_drops(of(testing_solution)), Coobject: to(test_plate))
taxonomy_path: Apply a few drops of the testing solution to the testing plate

steps.step_description: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box
steps.semantic_representation: POSITION(Agent: you, Object: covid_19_test_tube, Location: on(box))
taxonomy_path: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box

steps.step_description: Wait for a few minutes
steps.semantic_representation: WAIT(Agent: you, Duration: for(few_minutes))

steps.step_description: Arrange test materials in the plastic bag for disposal
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials, Destination: in(plastic_bag), Purpose: DISPOSE(Agent: you, Object: test_materials))

steps.step_description: Checks the test plate for the results
steps.semantic_representation: CHECK(Agent: you, Object: test_plate, Criterion: for(results))

steps.step_description: Arrange materials for disposal
steps.semantic_representation: ARRANGE(Agent: you, Object: materials, Purpose: for(disposal))

spec.notes: policy-only substitution; no role-argument swaps here (those belong to wrong_execution)
